Author: The Enceladeum
Name: HMoniker
Description: Changes your display name. Local only: visible only to yourself outside of HMS (HMapSync) sessions.
Changelog: 1.1.0: adds a small IPC surface (SetLocalName / ClearLocalName, Moniker IPC v2.1) so cooperating plugins can set or clear your local display name; for example HOutfits can now apply an NPC's name along with its look. Your own configured name is snapshotted and restored non-destructively. No change to this plugin's own UI.
